author: AgentGuard
name: Local LLM Service Exposed Beyond Loopback
description: Detects local LLM services exposed beyond loopback interfaces.
query: event.module: "agentguard" and agentguard.finding.type: "local_llm_service" and agentguard.ai.local_service: true and not destination.ip: ("127.0.0.1" or "::1" or "localhost")
